chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – Regarding the killer intending the repentance

parts.text: غَيْرِ وَاحِدٍ قَالُوا كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام )

text: الطَّوَافِ فَنَظَرَ فِي نَاحِيَةِ الْمَسْجِدِ إِلَى جَمَاعَةٍ فَقَالَ مَا هَذِهِ الْجَمَاعَةُ فَقَالُوا هَذَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ شِهَابٍ الزُّهْرِيُّ اخْتَلَطَ عَقْلُهُ فَلَيْسَ يَتَكَلَّمُ فَأَخْرَجَهُ أَهْلُهُ لَعَلَّهُ إِذَا رَأَى النَّاسَ أَنْ يَتَكَلَّمَ

فَلَمَّا قَضَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ طَوَافَهُ خَرَجَ حَتَّى دَنَا مِنْهُ فَلَمَّا رَآهُ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ شِهَابٍ عَرَفَهُ فَقَالَ لَهُ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) مَا لَكَ فَقَالَ وُلِّيتُ وِلَايَةً فَأَصَبْتُ دَماً فَقَتَلْتُ رَجُلًا فَدَخَلَنِي مَا تَرَى فَقَالَ لَهُ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) لَأَنَا عَلَيْكَ مِنْ يَأْسِكَ مِنْ رَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ أَشَدُّ خَوْفاً مِنِّي عَلَيْكَ مِمَّا أَتَيْتَ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ أَعْطِهِمُ الدِّيَةَ قَالَ قَدْ فَعَلْتُ فَأَبَوْا فَقَالَ اجْعَلْهَا صُرَراً ثُمَّ انْظُرْ مَوَاقِيتَ الصَّلَاةِ فَأَلْقِهَا فِي دَارِهِمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hisham Bin Salim, and Ibn Bukeyr and someone else who said,

‘Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> was in the circumambulation (of the Kaaba), so he<sup>asws</sup> looked at a group around the Masjid. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘What is this group?’ So they said, ‘This is Muhammad Bin Shihab Al-Zahry. His intellect is muddled up, so he does not speak. So his family have brought him out, perhaps when he sees the people he would speak’.

So when Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> fulfilled his<sup>asws</sup> circumambulation, he<sup>asws</sup> went out until he<sup>asws</sup> approached him. So when Muhammad Bin Shihab saw him<sup>asws</sup>, he recognised him<sup>asws</sup>. So Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘What is the matter with you?’ So he said, ‘I was given the governorship, so I shed blood. I killed a man, so there entered into me what you<sup>asws</sup> see’. So Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> have more intense fear of your despair from the Mercy of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> from what you have come to’. Then he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Give them the wergild’. He said, ‘I have done it, but they refused (to accept it)’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Make it as small packages, then wait for the timings of the Prayers, so throw these in their houses’.
